meaning: adj.户外的,适用于户外(活动者)的,爱好野外活动的
examples: Kathleen will get something outdoorsy from her hunter man.
I am not much of an outdoorsy type but as a child, I did do my share of camping, fishing and hiking.
White and green is fresh and outdoorsy while purple and green is high contrast (and needs to be handled with care).
Bite has presold 5, 000 pairs to outdoorsy stores like REI and shoe shops like Shoes-N-Feet.
The 2013 Subaru XV Crosstrek is aimed at the more-outdoorsy end of the spectrum.
